title: SQLancer TLP query with wrong results 2
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INTEGER NOT NULL, c1 REAL, c2 TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 1.5, 'test'), (2, NULL, 'example'), (3, 3.14159, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 INTEGER NOT NULL, c1 DATE);
SELECT t1.c0 FROM t1 WHERE (t1.c1 IS NOT NULL AND t1.c1 > 0) AND t1.c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from specific SQL query execution
